affected_pattern: Accounts whose tenure just crossed a loyalty-tier threshold show zero recurring charges
root_cause: Loyalty-tier discount misconfiguration — a newly introduced 'platinum' tier discount was configured as 100% (intended 10%), applying a full waiver instead of a partial credit to all customers who just qualified.
supporting_evidence: Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: Discount Config Off-By-Factor pattern
Discount row loyalty_tier=platinum has value=1.00 in the pricing table
Change ticket CHG-51204 deployed the tier two weeks ago
recommended_action: Correct the discount value from 1.00 to 0.10 in the pricing table
Rerate affected cycles and issue differential invoices
Add a schema constraint CHECK (discount_value BETWEEN 0 AND 0.99)
Require two-person review for pricing-table changes going forward
